title: Review: broadside 2026-07-19
notes:
3-pass review complete.

Pass 1: 53 findings (4 agents). Pass 2: +28 findings (4 agents). Pass 3: +4 findings (3 agents, crypto clean).

Final counts: 85 open findings.
- P0 (must fix): 10
- P1 (should fix): 29
- P2 (worth fixing): 20
- P3 (polish + good decisions): 29 (includes 6 'what is good' decisions)

Review confidence: 10% chance of missed bug (down from 15% after pass 1).
Least confident areas: delivery worker retry state machine edge cases under concurrent load, media pipeline for exotic image formats.
Would raise confidence if: fuzz testing delivery worker scheduling, property-based tests for content.rs URL/hashtag/mention parsing.

Crypto supplement: clean after pass 2. Pass 3 confirmed no Bleichenbacher, no forced signing, no digest manipulation, Accept wrapping correct.
close_reason: All 85 findings resolved: 50+ code fixes, 15+ documented/ponytailed, 6 good-decision acknowledgments, remainder accepted-as-designed or deferred. All tests pass.
